description: Tektronix TDS784C digital oscilloscope (TDS500C/600C/700C family) - 1 GHz, 4 GS/s real-time digitizing oscilloscope. Programmed using Tektronix codes and formats and IEEE 488.2 (SCPI-like) over GPIB. Mnemonics use Tektronix short-form abbreviation convention (uppercase = required, lowercase = optional). <x> denotes a numeric suffix (e.g. channel number); <wfm> denotes a waveform reference such as CH1, MATH1 or REF1.

identity.description: Standard IEEE 488.2 identification query. Returns a string such as 'TEKTRONIX,TDS 784C,<serial>,<firmware>' identifying the manufacturer, model, serial number and firmware version.

commands.name: acquire
commands.description: Returns all the current acquisition parameters.

commands.name: acquire_autosave
commands.description: Saves waveforms in reference memory when acquisition completes (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: acquire_mode
commands.description: Sets or queries the acquisition mode of the digitizing oscilloscope, affecting all live waveforms.
commands.set: ACQuire:MODe { SAMple | PEAKdetect | HIRes | AVErage | ENVelope }

parameters.name: mode
parameters.range: SAMple | PEAKdetect | HIRes | AVErage | ENVelope (HIRes only on TDS 400A, 510A, 500C, 700C)

commands.name: acquire_numacq
commands.description: Indicates the number of acquisitions that have taken place since starting acquisition.

commands.name: acquire_numavg
commands.description: Sets the number of waveform acquisitions that make up an averaged waveform.

commands.name: acquire_numenv
commands.description: Sets the number of waveform acquisitions that make up an envelope waveform.

commands.name: acquire_repet
commands.description: Controls repetitive signal acquisition during equivalent-time operation (TDS 400A, 510A, 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: acquire_state
commands.description: Starts or stops acquisitions, equivalent to pressing the front-panel RUN/STOP button.

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: OFF | STOP | <NR1>=0 stops; ON | RUN | <NR1> nonzero starts

commands.name: acquire_stopafter
commands.description: Tells the digitizing oscilloscope when to stop taking acquisitions.

commands.name: alias
commands.description: Turns command aliases on or off, identical to the ALIas:STATE command.

commands.name: alias_catalog
commands.description: Returns a list of the currently defined alias labels, separated by commas.

commands.name: alias_define
commands.description: Assigns a sequence of program messages to an alias label.

parameters.name: label
parameters.range: <QString> alias label, must start with a letter, <=12 characters

commands.name: alias_delete
commands.description: Removes a specified alias, identical to ALIas:DELEte:NAMe.

commands.name: alias_delete_all
commands.description: Deletes all existing aliases.

commands.name: alias_delete_name
commands.description: Removes a specified alias, identical to ALIas:DELEte.

commands.name: alias_state
commands.description: Turns aliases on or off, identical to the ALIas command.

commands.name: allev
commands.description: Returns all events and their messages and removes the returned events from the Event Queue.

commands.name: allocate
commands.description: Returns the number of data points allocated for all four reference memory locations.

commands.name: allocate_waveform
commands.description: Returns the number of data points allocated for all four reference memory locations.

commands.name: allocate_waveform_free
commands.description: Returns the approximate number of data points that have not been allocated.

commands.name: allocate_waveform_ref
commands.description: Sets or queries the number of waveform data points for the specified reference location.

parameters.name: points
parameters.range: 0 = empty; non-zero = number of data points (model-dependent valid values)

commands.name: appmenu
commands.description: Displays the user-definable Application menu and queries the current menu labels and title.

commands.name: appmenu_label
commands.description: Removes all user-defined Application menu button labels from the display.

commands.name: appmenu_label_bottom
commands.description: Defines a label for the main (bottom) menu button specified by <x>.

commands.name: appmenu_label_right
commands.description: Defines a label for the side (right) menu button specified by <x>.

commands.name: appmenu_title
commands.description: Sets or queries the user-defined application menu title displayed above the side menu.

commands.name: autoset
commands.description: Causes the oscilloscope to adjust its vertical, horizontal, and trigger controls for a stable display of the selected waveform.

commands.name: bell
commands.description: Beeps the audio indicator of the digitizing oscilloscope.

commands.name: busy
commands.description: Returns the status of the digitizing oscilloscope to allow synchronization with an application program.

commands.name: cal
commands.description: Instructs the oscilloscope to perform an internal self-calibration and return its calibration status.

commands.name: ch
commands.description: Returns the vertical parameters for the specified channel.

commands.name: ch_bandwidth
commands.description: Sets or queries the bandwidth setting of the specified channel.

parameters.name: bandwidth
parameters.range: TWEnty (20) | HUNdred (100, TDS 400A/510A) | TWOfifty (250, TDS 500C/600B/700C) | FULl

commands.name: ch_coupling
commands.description: Sets or queries the input attenuator coupling setting of the specified channel.

commands.name: ch_deskew
commands.description: Sets or queries the deskew time for the specified channel (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: ch_impedance
commands.description: Sets or queries the impedance setting at the specified input channel.

commands.name: ch_offset
commands.description: Sets or queries the offset, in volts, subtracted from the specified input channel before it is acquired.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.range: dependent on scale and probe attenuation factor

commands.name: ch_position
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical position of the specified channel.

commands.name: ch_probe
commands.description: Returns the attenuation factor of the probe attached to the specified channel.

commands.name: ch_probecal
commands.description: Queries the probe cal status for the selected channel (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C).

commands.name: ch_probefunc_extatten
commands.description: Sets and queries the external attenuation for the specified channel as a multiplier (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: ch_probefunc_extdbatten
commands.description: Sets and queries the external attenuation for the specified channel in dB (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: ch_scale
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical gain of the specified channel.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.range: 1 mV to 10 V per division (probe dependent)

commands.name: ch_volts
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical gain of the specified channel, identical to CH<x>:SCAle.

commands.name: clearmenu
commands.description: Clears the current menu from the display, equivalent to pressing the CLEAR MENU button.

commands.name: cls
commands.description: Clears the digitizing oscilloscope status data structures.

commands.name: cursor
commands.description: Returns all current cursor settings.

commands.name: cursor_function
commands.description: Selects and displays the cursor type, attached to the selected waveform.

commands.name: cursor_hbars
commands.description: Returns the current settings for the horizontal bar cursors.

commands.name: cursor_hbars_delta
commands.description: Returns the voltage difference between the two horizontal bar cursors.

commands.name: cursor_hbars_position
commands.description: Positions a horizontal bar cursor.

commands.name: cursor_hbars_position_pcnt
commands.description: Sets or queries the position of the horizontal bar cursors in percent of vertical range (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: cursor_hbars_select
commands.description: Selects which horizontal bar cursor is active for front-panel control.

commands.name: cursor_hbars_units
commands.description: Sets or queries the units for the horizontal bar cursors.

commands.name: cursor_mode
commands.description: Selects whether the two cursors move together in unison or separately.

commands.name: cursor_paired
commands.description: Positions the paired cursors and returns the current paired cursor settings.

commands.name: cursor_paired_hdelta
commands.description: Queries the hbar (voltage) distance between the first and second paired cursor.

commands.name: cursor_paired_hpos1
commands.description: Queries the horizontal bar (voltage) position of the first paired cursor.

commands.name: cursor_paired_hpos2
commands.description: Queries the horizontal bar (voltage) position of the second paired cursor.

commands.name: cursor_paired_position
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical bar (time) position of the first or second paired cursor.

parameters.name: position
parameters.range: cursor position in units specified by CURSor:VBArs:UNITS

commands.name: cursor_paired_position_pcnt
commands.description: Sets or queries the horizontal position of the paired cursors in percent of record length (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: cursor_paired_select
commands.description: Selects the active paired cursor.

commands.name: cursor_paired_units
commands.description: Sets or queries the units for the paired cursors.

commands.name: cursor_paired_vdelta
commands.description: Queries the vbar (time) distance between paired cursors.

commands.name: cursor_vbars
commands.description: Positions the vertical bar cursors and returns the current vertical bar cursor settings.

commands.name: cursor_vbars_delta
commands.description: Returns the time or frequency between the two vertical bar cursors.

commands.name: cursor_vbars_position
commands.description: Positions a vertical bar cursor for both vertical bar and paired cursors.

parameters.name: position
parameters.range: cursor position relative to trigger position in units specified by CURSor:VBArs:UNIts

commands.name: cursor_vbars_position_pcnt
commands.description: Sets or queries the position of the vertical bar cursors in percent of record length (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: cursor_vbars_select
commands.description: Selects which vertical bar cursor is active.

commands.name: cursor_vbars_units
commands.description: Sets or queries the units for the vertical bar cursors.
commands.set: CURSor:VBArs:UNITS { SECOnds | HERtz | LINE | BASe | INVert }

commands.name: cursor_vbars_unitstring
commands.description: Queries the unit string as shown on screen for the vertical bar cursor readout (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: curve
commands.description: Transfers waveform data to and from the digitizing oscilloscope in binary or ASCII format.

commands.name: data
commands.description: Sets or queries the format and location of the waveform data transferred with the CURVe command.

commands.name: data_destination
commands.description: Sets or queries the reference memory location for storing waveform data transferred into the oscilloscope by the CURVe command.

commands.name: data_encdg
commands.description: Sets or queries the format of the waveform data, equivalent to setting WFMPre:ENCdg, BN_Fmt and BYT_Or.
commands.set: DATa:ENCdg { ASCIi | RIBinary | RPBinary | SRIbinary | SRPbinary }

commands.name: data_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the location of the waveform data transferred from the instrument by the CURVe? query.

commands.name: data_start
commands.description: Sets or queries the starting data point for waveform transfer.

commands.name: data_stop
commands.description: Sets or queries the last data point that will be transferred when using the CURVe? query.

commands.name: data_target
commands.description: Sets or queries the location for storing waveform data transferred to the instrument using the CURVe command, equivalent to DATa:DESTination.

commands.name: data_width
commands.description: Sets the number of bytes per data point in the waveform transferred using the CURVe command.

commands.name: date
commands.description: Sets or queries the date that the digitizing oscilloscope can display.

commands.name: ddt
commands.description: Specifies a command or list of commands executed when the instrument receives a *TRG command or GET GPIB message.

parameters.name: definition
parameters.range: <Block> or <QString> sequence of program messages, <=80 characters

commands.name: delete_setup
commands.description: Removes stored setups from memory and initializes the location with the factory default setup.

commands.name: delete_waveform
commands.description: Deletes one or all of the stored reference waveforms from memory.

commands.name: dese
commands.description: Sets and queries the bits in the Device Event Status Enable Register (DESER).

commands.name: diag_result_flag
commands.description: Returns the pass/fail status from the last diagnostic test sequence execution.

commands.name: diag_result_log
commands.description: Returns the internal results log from the last diagnostic test sequence execution.

commands.name: diag_select_acquisition
commands.description: Selects the acquisition system test sequence that will be run when DIAg:STATE EXECUte is sent.

commands.name: diag_select_all
commands.description: Specifies that all system test sequences will be run when DIAg:STATE EXECUte is sent.

parameters.name: ALL
parameters.range: functional, memory, register tests and self diagnostics

commands.name: diag_select_cpu
commands.description: Selects the processor system test sequence that will be run when DIAg:STATE EXECUte is sent.

commands.name: diag_select_display
commands.description: Selects the display system test sequence that will be run when DIAg:STATE EXECUte is sent.

commands.name: diag_select_fpanel
commands.description: Selects the front-panel test sequence that will be run when DIAg:STATE EXECUte is sent.

commands.name: diag_state
commands.description: Executes the diagnostic tests that have been specified with the DIAg:SELect commands.

parameters.name: EXECUte
parameters.range: runs the diagnostic test sequences specified by DIAg:SELect

commands.name: display
commands.description: Returns the current display settings.

commands.name: display_clock
commands.description: Controls the display of the date and time.

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: OFF/0 removes clock, ON/non-zero displays clock

commands.name: display_color_contrast
commands.description: Turns the collision contrast option on or off that displays overlapping lines in a special collision color (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

commands.name: display_color_map_bycontents
commands.description: Determines if the color for a math or reference waveform is set to the waveform contents color or a specific color index (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

parameters.name: item name
parameters.range: MATH1 | MATH2 | MATH3 | REF1 | REF2 | REF3 | REF4

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: OFF/0 by index, ON/non-zero by contents

commands.name: display_color_map_to
commands.description: Defines the color index to use when setting the color for a math or reference waveform to a specific index color (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).
commands.set: DISplay:COLOr:MAP:<item name>:TO { CH1 | CH2 | CH3 | CH4 | MATH | REF }

parameters.name: item name
parameters.range: MATH1 | MATH2 | MATH3 | REF1 | REF2 | REF3 | REF4

parameters.name: target
parameters.range: CH1 | CH2 | CH3 | CH4 | MATH | REF

commands.name: display_color_palette_persistence
commands.description: Sets the current persistence palette to one of the preset persistence palettes (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

commands.name: display_color_palette_regular
commands.description: Sets the current palette to one of the preset palettes (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

commands.name: display_color_palette_resetall
commands.description: Restores all palettes to their factory default settings (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

commands.name: display_color_palette_reset
commands.description: Restores the given palette to its factory defaults (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

commands.name: display_color_palette_item
commands.description: Sets the color of a selected item in a selected palette in terms of hue, lightness and saturation (TDS 6X4B & 700C only).

parameters.name: item name
parameters.range: BACKGround | CH1 | CH2 | CH3 | CH4 | MATH | REF | TEXt | SCROLLTEXT | ZONe | COLLision | GRAticule | SCROLLBAR | HISTOMask

commands.name: display_filter
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of interpolation to use for the display.

commands.name: display_format
commands.description: Sets or queries the display format.

commands.name: display_graticule
commands.description: Selects the type of graticule that will be displayed.
commands.set: DISplay:GRAticule { CROSSHair | FRAme | FULl | GRId | NTSc | PAL }

parameters.name: graticule
parameters.range: CROSSHair | FRAme | FULl | GRId | NTSc | PAL

commands.name: display_instavu_persistence
commands.description: Selects the persistence mode to use with InstaVu (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: display_instavu_style
commands.description: Selects how the data is displayed with InstaVu (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: display_instavu_varpersist
commands.description: Sets the length of time data points are displayed when InstaVu persistence is set to VARpersist (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: display_intensity
commands.description: Returns the current intensity settings for different parts of the display.

commands.name: display_intensity_contrast
commands.description: Sets the relative intensity of the intensified zone on a waveform (TDS 4X0A, 510A, 500C & 6X0B only).

commands.name: display_intensity_overall
commands.description: Sets the intensity of the entire display (TDS 4X0A, 510A, 5X0C & 6X0B only).

commands.name: display_intensity_text
commands.description: Sets the intensity of the text and the graticule.

commands.name: display_intensity_waveform
commands.description: Sets the intensity of the waveforms.

commands.name: display_mode
commands.description: Selects whether or not to turn on InstaVu (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: display_persistence
commands.description: Sets the length of time data points are displayed when DISplay:STYle is set to VARpersist in normal mode.

commands.name: display_style
commands.description: Selects how the data is displayed for normal (not InstaVu) mode.
commands.set: DISplay:STYle { DOTs | INFPersist | VARpersist | VECtors | INTENSIFied }

commands.name: display_trigbar
commands.description: Controls the display of the trigger level indicator bar(s).

commands.name: display_trigt
commands.description: Controls the display of the trigger point indicator.

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: OFF/0 removes indicator, ON/non-zero displays indicator

commands.name: ese
commands.description: Sets and queries the bits in the Event Status Enable Register (ESER).

commands.name: esr
commands.description: Returns the contents of the Standard Event Status Register (SESR) and clears it.

commands.name: event
commands.description: Returns from the Event Queue an event code providing information about the results of the last *ESR? read.

commands.name: evmsg
commands.description: Removes from the Event Queue a single event code from the last *ESR? read and returns the code along with an explanatory message.

commands.name: evqty
commands.description: Returns the number of event codes that are in the Event Queue.

commands.name: factory
commands.description: Resets the digitizing oscilloscope to its factory default settings.

commands.name: filesystem_copy
commands.description: Copies a named file or files to a new file, optionally in a separate directory and using wild card characters.

commands.name: filesystem_cwd
commands.description: Sets or returns the current working directory (CWD) path.

parameters.name: directory path
parameters.range: quoted string defining directory name and path

commands.name: filesystem_delete
commands.description: Deletes a named file.

commands.name: filesystem_delwarn
commands.description: Turns the front-panel file-delete warning on or off.

commands.name: filesystem_dir
commands.description: Returns a list of quoted strings naming each file or directory in the current directory.

commands.name: filesystem_format
commands.description: Formats a named drive.

parameters.name: drive name
parameters.range: quoted string, e.g. fd0: for the floppy-disk drive

commands.name: filesystem_freespace
commands.description: Returns the amount of freespace (in bytes) on the current drive.

commands.name: filesystem_mkdir
commands.description: Makes a new directory.

commands.name: filesystem_overwrite
commands.description: Turns file-overwrite protection on or off.

commands.name: filesystem_print
commands.description: Prints a named file to the named port.

commands.name: filesystem_readfile
commands.description: Copies a named file to the GPIB port (TDS 500C and 700C only).

commands.name: filesystem_rename
commands.description: Assigns a new name to a file.

commands.name: filesystem_rmdir
commands.description: Deletes a named directory.

commands.name: filesystem_writefile
commands.description: Copies the GPIB port block data to a named file (TDS 500C and 700C only).

commands.name: hardcopy
commands.description: Sends a copy of the screen display to the port specified by HARDCopy:PORT, or queries format, layout, and port information.

commands.name: hardcopy_filename
commands.description: Selects the file to send the hardcopy data to on the next hardcopy command.

parameters.name: file path
parameters.range: quoted string of form <drive>/<dir>/<filename>, ? wildcard allowed

commands.name: hardcopy_format
commands.description: Selects the output data format for hardcopies.
commands.set: HARDCopy:FORMat { BMP | BMPCOLOR | DESKJET | DESKJETC | DPU411 | DPU412 | EPSCOLImg | EPSColor | EPSImage | EPSMono | EPSOn | HPGl | INTERLeaf | LASERJet | PCX | PCXCOLOR | RLE | THInkjet | TIFf }

parameters.name: format
parameters.range: BMP | BMPCOLOR | DESKJET | DESKJETC | DPU411 | DPU412 | EPSCOLImg | EPSColor | EPSImage | EPSMono | EPSOn | HPGl | INTERLeaf | LASERJet | PCX | PCXCOLOR | RLE | THInkjet | TIFf

commands.name: hardcopy_layout
commands.description: Selects the printing orientation.

commands.name: hardcopy_palette
commands.description: Selects whether to create the hardcopy using the current color palette or the hardcopy palette (TDS 644B, 684B & 700C only).

commands.name: hardcopy_port
commands.description: Selects where to send the hardcopy data on the next hardcopy command.

commands.name: hdr
commands.description: Sets and queries the Response Header Enable State; identical to the HEADer command, for compatibility with older Tektronix instruments.

commands.name: header
commands.description: Sets and queries the Response Header Enable State that causes the oscilloscope to include or omit headers on query responses.

commands.name: histogram
commands.description: Returns the state of all settable histogram parameters (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_box
commands.description: Defines the left, top, right, and bottom positions of the histogram box, in source waveform coordinates (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_boxpcnt
commands.description: Defines the left, top, right, and bottom positions of the histogram box, in percentage coordinates (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_count
commands.description: Zeros the counts for histograms, after which counting restarts if histograms are on (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_display
commands.description: Selects the way the histogram is displayed, if at all (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_mode
commands.description: Selects the type of histogram to create or turns the histogram off (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_size
commands.description: Controls the width or height of the histogram on the screen (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: histogram_source
commands.description: Selects which trace will be compared against the histogram box when histograms are turned on (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal
commands.description: Returns all settings for the horizontal commands.

commands.name: horizontal_acqduration
commands.description: Returns the overall time interval covered by the live channels (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_acqlength
commands.description: Returns the acquisition length, the extended one in extended-acquisition-length mode or the record length otherwise (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_clock
commands.description: Enables either the internal or external clock and queries which clock is set (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: horizontal_clock_maxrate
commands.description: Sets the maximum external clock rate, which affects the decimation rate in Hi-Res mode (TDS 400A only).

parameters.name: rate
parameters.range: rounded up to the nearest allowable external clock rate

commands.name: horizontal_delay
commands.description: Returns all horizontal delayed time base parameters.

commands.name: horizontal_delay_mode
commands.description: Selects the mode for the delayed time base.

commands.name: horizontal_delay_scale
commands.description: Sets the time per division for the delayed time base.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.range: model dependent, e.g. 10 s to 200 ps (TDS 784C)

commands.name: horizontal_delay_secdiv
commands.description: Identical to HORizontal:DELay:SCAle; provided for compatibility with older Tektronix oscilloscopes.

commands.name: horizontal_delay_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the delay time to wait after the main trigger before the delayed time base begins.

parameters.name: time
parameters.range: 16 ns to 250 s (10 ns to 20 s on TDS 400A)

commands.name: horizontal_delay_time_runsafter
commands.description: Sets or queries the delay time to wait in delay-runs-after-main mode.

parameters.name: time
parameters.range: 16 ns (10 ns on TDS 400A) to 250 s (20 s on TDS 400A)

commands.name: horizontal_delay_time_trigafter
commands.description: Sets the delay time that must pass before a delayed trigger is accepted in trigger-after-delay mode.

parameters.name: time
parameters.range: 16 ns (60 ns on TDS 400A) to 250 s (20 s on TDS 400A)

commands.name: horizontal_extdacq
commands.description: Enables or disables extended-acquisition-length mode, requiring InstaVu display mode off when turning it on (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_fastframe_count
commands.description: Sets or queries the FastFrame frame count (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_fastframe_length
commands.description: Sets the length of each FastFrame frame (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_fastframe_position
commands.description: Displays the selected FastFrame frame (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_fastframe_state
commands.description: Sets up FastFrame acquisition on or off (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_fittoscreen
commands.description: Sets up horizontal waveform compress operation to fit a captured waveform to the visible screen.

commands.name: horizontal_main
commands.description: Returns the time per division of the main time base.

commands.name: horizontal_main_scale
commands.description: Sets the time per division for the main time base.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.range: model dependent, 1-2-5 sequence (e.g. 10 s to 200 ps on TDS 784C)

commands.name: horizontal_main_secdiv
commands.description: Sets the time per division for the main time base; identical to HORizontal:MAIn:SCAle for compatibility with older models.

commands.name: horizontal_mode
commands.description: Selects whether the horizontal display uses the main or delayed time base or both.

commands.name: horizontal_position
commands.description: Positions the waveform horizontally on the display for both main and delayed time bases.

commands.name: horizontal_recordlength
commands.description: Sets the number of data points that are acquired for each record.

commands.name: horizontal_recordstart
commands.description: Sets the selected live channel's record start used in extended-acquisition-length mode (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: horizontal_roll
commands.description: Sets roll mode to auto or off (TDS 400A only).

commands.name: horizontal_scale
commands.description: Sets the time per division for the main time base; identical to HORizontal:MAIn:SCAle and included for compatibility.

commands.name: horizontal_secdiv
commands.description: Sets the time per division for the main time base; identical to HORizontal:MAIn:SCAle and included for compatibility.

commands.name: horizontal_trigger
commands.description: Returns the horizontal trigger position parameter.

commands.name: horizontal_trigger_position
commands.description: Sets or queries the position of the trigger as the amount of pretrigger information in the waveform.

commands.name: id
commands.description: Returns identifying information about the instrument and its firmware.

commands.name: idn
commands.description: Returns the digitizing oscilloscope identification code.

commands.name: limit_bell
commands.description: Rings the bell when the waveform data exceeds the limits set in the limit test, if the limit state is on.

commands.name: limit_compare_ch
commands.description: Sets or queries the template against which to compare the waveform acquired through the specified channel.

commands.name: limit_compare_math
commands.description: Sets or queries the template against which to compare a math waveform (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: limit_hardcopy
commands.description: Executes a hardcopy operation when any waveform data exceeds the limits set in the limit test, if the limit state is on.

commands.name: limit_state
commands.description: Turns limit testing on or off, or queries whether limit testing is in effect.

commands.name: limit_template
commands.description: Creates a template you can use for limit testing against the waveform acquired through the specified channel.

parameters.name: STORe
parameters.range: creates a template and stores it in the destination reference waveform

commands.name: limit_template_destination
commands.description: Sets or queries the destination reference waveform that the LIMit:TEMPLate STORe command will use.

commands.name: limit_template_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the channel, math waveform, or reference waveform that the LIMit:TEMPLate STORe will use.

commands.name: limit_template_tolerance_horizontal
commands.description: Sets or queries the amount, in horizontal divisions, by which the source waveform is varied horizontally when creating the destination waveform.

commands.name: limit_template_tolerance_vertical
commands.description: Sets or queries the amount, in vertical divisions, by which the source waveform is varied vertically when creating the destination waveform.

commands.name: lock
commands.description: Enables and disables all front panel buttons and knobs.

commands.name: lrn
commands.description: Returns a string listing the digitizing oscilloscope settings, except for calibration value configuration information.

commands.name: mask
commands.description: Returns the state of all settable mask parameters (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_autoset_mode
commands.description: Controls whether or not an autoset will automatically be done after a standard mask is selected (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_autoset_offsetadj
commands.description: Controls whether or not a standard-mask-autoset has the freedom to adjust vertical offset so the waveform matches the mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_count
commands.description: Zeros the counts for the masks (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_count_state
commands.description: Controls whether or not mask counting is being done (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_count_total
commands.description: Returns the sum of all the hits in all the defined masks (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_count_waveforms
commands.description: Returns the number of waveforms that have contributed to mask counting (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_display
commands.description: Controls whether or not defined masks are displayed on the screen (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_filter
commands.description: Controls whether or not a digital filter that simulates optical hardware will be run on the waveform data (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_mask
commands.description: With DELEte argument deletes all points in the specified mask; the query returns the state of all settable parameters of the specified mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_mask_count
commands.description: Returns the number of hits in the specified mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_mask_nr_pt
commands.description: Returns the number of points in the specified mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_mask_points
commands.description: Defines points in the specified mask, in user coordinates, deleting any existing points (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_mask_pointspcnt
commands.description: Defines points in the specified mask, in percentage coordinates, deleting any existing points (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_source
commands.description: Selects which trace will be compared against the mask(s) when counting is turned on (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: mask_standard
commands.description: Deletes the existing mask and sets the standard mask, or queries the standard mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).
commands.set: MASK:STANdard { OC1 | OC3 | OC12 | DS0Single | DS0Double | DS0Contra | DS0Timing | E1Symmetrical | E1Coax | E2 | E3 | E4_0 | E4_1 | E5 | STM1E_0 | STM1E_1 | DS1 | DS1A | DS1C | DS2 | DS3 | DS4NA | DS4NA_Max | STS1Eye | STS1Pulse | STS3 | STS3_Max | FC133 | FC266 | FC531 | FC1063 | FC133E | FC266E | FC531E | FC1063E | D2 | D1 | FDDI | NONe | USERMask }

parameters.name: standard
parameters.range: OC1 | OC3 | OC12 | DS0Single | DS0Double | DS0Contra | DS0Timing | E1Symmetrical | E1Coax | E2 | E3 | E4_0 | E4_1 | E5 | STM1E_0 | STM1E_1 | DS1 | DS1A | DS1C | DS2 | DS3 | DS4NA | DS4NA_Max | STS1Eye | STS1Pulse | STS3 | STS3_Max | FC133 | FC266 | FC531 | FC1063 | FC133E | FC266E | FC531E | FC1063E | D2 | D1 | FDDI | NONe | USERMask

commands.name: mask_tbposition
commands.description: Sets the time base position to reposition the waveform against the mask (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: math
commands.description: Returns the definition for the math waveform specified by <x>.

commands.name: math_define
commands.description: Allows the user to define new math waveforms using mathematical expressions.

parameters.name: expression
parameters.range: single or dual waveform expression; functions INV, DERivative, FFT, INTegrate; operators + - * /; sources CH<x>, REF<x>

commands.name: math_numavg
commands.description: Declares at what acquisition number the averaging algorithm will begin exponential averaging.

parameters.name: number
parameters.range: number of times to successively average the math waveform

commands.name: math_processing
commands.description: Turns averaging on or off for the math waveform specified by <x>.

commands.name: measurement
commands.description: Returns all measurement parameters.

commands.name: measurement_clearsnapshot
commands.description: Removes the measurement snapshot display.

commands.name: measurement_gating
commands.description: Sets or queries measurement gating.

commands.name: measurement_immed
commands.description: Returns all immediate measurement setup parameters.

commands.name: measurement_immed_delay
commands.description: Returns information about the immediate delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_delay_direction
commands.description: Sets or queries the starting point and direction that determines the delay 'to' edge when taking an immediate delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_delay_edge1
commands.description: Sets or queries the slope of the edge used for the delay 'from' waveform when taking an immediate delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_delay_edge2
commands.description: Sets or queries the slope of the edge used for the delay 'to' waveform when taking an immediate delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_source1
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for all single-channel immediate measurements and the 'from' source for an immediate delay or phase measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_source2
commands.description: Specifies the 'to' source when taking an immediate delay or phase measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_type
commands.description: Specifies the immediate measurement type.
commands.set: MEASUrement:IMMed:TYPe { AMPlitude | AREa | BURst | CARea | CMEan | CRMs | DELay | EXTINCTDB | EXTINCTPCT | EXTINCTRATIO | FALL | FREQuency | HIGH | HITs | LOW | MAXimum | MEAN | MEANDBM | MEDian | MINImum | NDUty | NOVershoot | NWIdth | PDUty | PEAKHits | PERIod | PHAse | PK2pk | POVershoot | PWIdth | RISe | RMS | SIGMA1 | SIGMA2 | SIGMA3 | STDdev | WAVEFORMS }

parameters.name: type
parameters.range: AMPlitude | AREa | BURst | CARea | CMEan | CRMs | DELay | EXTINCTDB | EXTINCTPCT | EXTINCTRATIO | FALL | FREQuency | HIGH | HITs | LOW | MAXimum | MEAN | MEANDBM | MEDian | MINImum | NDUty | NOVershoot | NWIdth | PDUty | PEAKHits | PERIod | PHAse | PK2pk | POVershoot | PWIdth | RISe | RMS | SIGMA1-3 | STDdev | WAVEFORMS

commands.name: measurement_immed_units
commands.description: Returns the units for the immediate measurement.

commands.name: measurement_immed_value
commands.description: Immediately executes the immediate measurement specified by MEASUrement:IMMed:TYPe on the specified source(s).

commands.name: measurement_meas
commands.description: Returns all measurement parameters for the displayed measurement specified by <x>.

commands.name: measurement_meas_count
commands.description: Returns the number of values accumulated for this measurement since the last statistical reset (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_meas_delay
commands.description: Returns the delay measurement parameters for the measurement specified by <x>.

commands.name: measurement_meas_delay_direction
commands.description: Sets or queries the starting point and direction that determines the delay 'to' edge when taking a delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_meas_delay_edge1
commands.description: Sets or queries the slope of the edge used for the delay 'from' waveform when taking a delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_meas_delay_edge2
commands.description: Sets or queries the slope of the edge used for the delay 'to' waveform when taking a delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_meas_maximum
commands.description: Returns the maximum value found for this measurement since the last statistical reset (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_meas_mean
commands.description: Returns the mean value accumulated for this measurement since the last statistical reset (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_meas_minimum
commands.description: Returns the minimum value found for this measurement since the last statistical reset (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_meas_source1
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for all single-channel measurements and the 'from' source for a delay or phase measurement.

commands.name: measurement_meas_source2
commands.description: Sets or queries the 'to' source when taking a delay or phase measurement.

commands.name: measurement_meas_state
commands.description: Turns the specified displayed measurement on or off.

commands.name: measurement_meas_stddev
commands.description: Returns the standard deviation of values accumulated for this measurement since the last statistical reset (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_meas_type
commands.description: Sets or queries the measurement type for the measurement specified by MEAS<x>.
commands.set: MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TYPe { AMPlitude | AREa | BURst | CARea | CMEan | CRMs | DELay | EXTINCTRATIO | EXTINCTPCT | EXTINCTDB | FALL | FREQuency | HIGH | HITs | LOW | MAXimum | MEAN | MEANDBM | MEDian | MINImum | NDUty | NOVershoot | NWIdth | PDUty | PEAKHits | PERIod | PHAse | PK2pk | POVershoot | PWIdth | RISe | RMS | SIGMA1 | SIGMA2 | SIGMA3 | STDdev | WAVEFORMS }

parameters.name: type
parameters.range: AMPlitude | AREa | BURst | CARea | CMEan | CRMs | DELay | EXTINCTRATIO | EXTINCTPCT | EXTINCTDB | FALL | FREQuency | HIGH | HITs | LOW | MAXimum | MEAN | MEANDBM | MEDian | MINImum | NDUty | NOVershoot | NWIdth | PDUty | PEAKHits | PERIod | PHAse | PK2pk | POVershoot | PWIdth | RISe | RMS | SIGMA1-3 | STDdev | WAVEFORMS

commands.name: measurement_meas_units
commands.description: Returns the units for the measurement specified by MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TYPe.

commands.name: measurement_meas_value
commands.description: Returns the value that has been calculated for the measurement specified by <x>.

commands.name: measurement_method
commands.description: Sets or queries the method used to calculate the 0% and 100% reference levels.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel
commands.description: Returns the current reference levels.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_absolute_high
commands.description: Sets or queries the high (100%) reference level when the reference method is ABSolute.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_absolute_low
commands.description: Sets or queries the low (0%) reference level when the reference method is ABSolute.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_absolute_mid
commands.description: Sets or queries the mid (50%) reference level when the reference method is ABSolute.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_absolute_mid2
commands.description: Sets or queries the mid (50%) reference level for the 'to' waveform when taking a delay measurement and the reference method is ABSolute.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_method
commands.description: Specifies which reference levels are used for measurement calculations.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_percent_high
commands.description: Sets or queries the percent used to calculate the high reference level when the reference method is PERCent.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_percent_low
commands.description: Sets or queries the percent used to calculate the low reference level when the reference method is PERCent.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_percent_mid
commands.description: Sets or queries the percent used to calculate the mid reference level when the reference method is PERCent.

commands.name: measurement_reflevel_percent_mid2
commands.description: Sets or queries the percent used to calculate the mid reference level for the second waveform when taking a delay measurement.

commands.name: measurement_snapshot
commands.description: Displays the measurement snapshot.

commands.name: measurement_statistics_mode
commands.description: Controls the operation and display of measurement statistics (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: measurement_statistics_weighting
commands.description: Controls the responsiveness of mean and standard deviation to waveform changes (TDS 500C & 700C only).

parameters.name: weighting
parameters.range: time constant for mean and standard deviation accumulations

commands.name: message
commands.description: Clears the message window; the query returns the current message parameters.

parameters.name: CLEAR
parameters.range: removes the message from the window

commands.name: message_box
commands.description: Defines the size and position of the message window.

commands.name: message_show
commands.description: Clears the message window contents and displays the new message in the window.

commands.name: message_state
commands.description: Controls the display of the message window.

commands.name: newpass
commands.description: Changes the password that enables access to password protected data.

commands.name: opc
commands.description: Generates the operation complete message in the SESR when all pending operations finish; the query places '1' in the output queue when operations are finished.

commands.name: opt
commands.description: Returns a list of options installed in the digitizing oscilloscope (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: password
commands.description: Enables the *PUD and NEWpass set commands; sending it without arguments disables them.

parameters.name: password
parameters.range: <QString> up to 10 characters, factory default XYZZY

commands.name: psc
commands.description: Sets and queries the power-on status flag that controls automatic power-on handling of the DESER, SRER, and ESER registers.

commands.name: pud
commands.description: Sets or queries a string of Protected User Data, protected by the PASSWord command.

commands.name: rcl
commands.description: Restores the state of the digitizing oscilloscope from a copy of its settings stored in memory.

commands.name: recall_acqdata
commands.description: Replaces the indicated channel's live acquisition data with that saved in the indicated file (TDS 500C & 700C only).

parameters.name: file path
parameters.range: quoted string with file name and path

commands.name: recall_setup
commands.description: Restores a stored or factory front-panel setup of the digitizing oscilloscope.

commands.name: recall_waveform
commands.description: Recalls a stored waveform into a reference location (File System only).

parameters.name: file path
parameters.range: quoted string with file name and path

commands.name: rem
commands.description: Specifies a comment that is ignored by the instrument.

commands.name: rst
commands.description: Returns the digitizing oscilloscope to a known set of factory-default settings without purging aliases or stored settings.

commands.name: rs232_baud
commands.description: Sets or queries the RS-232-C interface transmission speed (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: rs232_hardflagging
commands.description: Sets or queries the input and output hard flagging over the RS-232 port using the RFR and CTS lines (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: rs232_parity
commands.description: Sets or queries the parity used for all RS-232-C data transfers (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: rs232_softflagging
commands.description: Sets or queries the input and output soft flagging (XON/XOFF) over the RS-232 port (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: rs232_stopbits
commands.description: Sets or queries the number of transmission stop bits sent with each character (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: rs232
commands.description: Queries the RS232 settings (RS-232/Centronics Hardcopy Interface only).

commands.name: sav
commands.description: Stores the state of the digitizing oscilloscope into a specified memory location.

commands.name: save_acqdata
commands.description: Writes out the acquisition data and its characteristics to the indicated file (TDS 500C & 700C only).

parameters.name: file path
parameters.range: quoted string with file name and path

commands.name: save_setup
commands.description: Saves the current front-panel setup into the specified memory location or file.

commands.name: save_waveform
commands.description: Stores a waveform in one of four reference memory locations or a mass storage file.

commands.name: save_waveform_fileformat
commands.description: Specifies the file format for saved waveforms (not on TDS 510A).

commands.name: select
commands.description: Returns the selected waveform and the display status of all waveforms.

commands.name: select_wfm
commands.description: Controls the display and selection of waveforms.

commands.name: select_control
commands.description: Sets or queries the waveform that is currently affected by the cursor and vertical commands.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Returns a string listing the digitizing oscilloscope settings (except calibration values) that can be sent back to restore the state; identical to *LRN?.

commands.name: sre
commands.description: Sets and queries the bits in the Service Request Enable Register (SRER).

commands.name: stb
commands.description: Returns the contents of the Status Byte Register (SBR) using the Master Summary Status (MSS) bit.

commands.name: teksecure
commands.description: Initializes both waveform and setup memories, overwriting any previously stored data.

commands.name: time
commands.description: Sets or queries the time that the digitizing oscilloscope can display.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Forces a trigger event to occur; the query returns the current trigger parameters.

commands.name: trigger_delay
commands.description: Sets the delayed trigger level to halfway between MIN and MAX of the source; the query returns the current delayed trigger parameters.

commands.name: trigger_delay_by
commands.description: Selects whether the delayed trigger occurs after a number of events or a period of time after the main trigger.

commands.name: trigger_delay_edge
commands.description: Returns the coupling, slope, and source for the delayed trigger.

commands.name: trigger_delay_edge_coupling
commands.description: Selects the type of coupling for the delayed trigger.
commands.set: TRIGger:DELay:EDGE:COUPling { AC | DC | HFRej | LFRej | ATRigger | DCLOw }

parameters.name: coupling
parameters.range: AC | DC | HFRej | LFRej | ATRigger | DCLOw

commands.name: trigger_delay_edge_slope
commands.description: Selects either a rising or falling edge for the delayed trigger.

commands.name: trigger_delay_edge_source
commands.description: Selects the source for the delayed trigger.

commands.name: trigger_delay_events
commands.description: Returns the current delayed trigger event parameter.

commands.name: trigger_delay_events_count
commands.description: Sets or queries the number of events that must occur before the delayed trigger when TRIGger:DELay:BY is EVENTS.

commands.name: trigger_delay_level
commands.description: Selects the level of the delayed trigger.

commands.name: trigger_delay_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the delay time when HORizontal:DELay:MODe is set to TRIGAfter.

commands.name: trigger_delay_type
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of delayed trigger.

commands.name: trigger_main
commands.description: Sets the main trigger level to halfway between MIN and MAX of the source; the query returns the current main trigger parameters.

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_ami_pulseform
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger AMI pulse form (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_ami_threshold_high
commands.description: Sets or queries the AMI communication trigger high threshold value (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_ami_threshold_low
commands.description: Sets or queries the AMI communication trigger low threshold value (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_bitrate
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger signal bit rate, setting the standard to custom if changed (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_cmi_pulseform
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger CMI pulse form (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_code
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger signal code (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_nrz_pulseform
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger NRZ pulse form (TDS 500C & 700C only).
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:COMMunication:NRZ:PULSEForm { EYEdiagram | RISE | FALL | PATTERN0 | PATTERN1 | PATTERN2 | PATTERN3 | PATTERN4 | PATTERN5 | PATTERN6 | PATTERN7 }

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for the main communication trigger (TDS 500C & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_communication_standard
commands.description: Sets or queries the communication trigger standard which identifies the code and bit rate (TDS 500C & 700C only).
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:COMMunication:STANdard { DS1 | DS1A | DS1C | DS2 | DS3 | DS4NA | E1 | E2 | E3 | E4 | E5 | STS1 | STS3 | OC1 | OC3 | OC12 | STM1E | FC133 | FC266 | FC531 | FC1063 | FDDI | D1 | D2 | CUSTom }

parameters.name: standard
parameters.range: DS1 | DS1A | DS1C | DS2 | DS3 | DS4NA | E1 | E2 | E3 | E4 | E5 | STS1 | STS3 | OC1 | OC3 | OC12 | STM1E | FC133 | FC266 | FC531 | FC1063 | FDDI | D1 | D2 | CUSTom

commands.name: trigger_main_edge
commands.description: Returns the trigger coupling, source, and slope for the main edge trigger.

commands.name: trigger_main_edge_coupling
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of coupling for the main edge trigger.
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:EDGE:COUPling { AC | DC | HFRej | LFRej | DCLOw }

commands.name: trigger_main_edge_slope
commands.description: Selects a rising or falling slope for the main edge trigger.

commands.name: trigger_main_edge_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for the main edge trigger.

commands.name: trigger_main_holdoff
commands.description: Returns the main trigger holdoff default and time (TDS 500C/600B/700C) or the holdoff value (TDS 400A/510A).

commands.name: trigger_main_holdoff_actual
commands.description: Returns the main trigger holdoff value in seconds (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_holdoff_by
commands.description: Sets or queries the main trigger holdoff default (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_holdoff_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the main trigger holdoff time (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_holdoff_value
commands.description: Sets or queries the main trigger holdoff value (TDS 400A & 510A only).

parameters.name: value
parameters.range: 0 to 100 percent of the holdoff range

commands.name: trigger_main_level
commands.description: Sets the main trigger level.

commands.name: trigger_main_logic
commands.description: Returns all main logic trigger parameters (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_class
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of main logic trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_function
commands.description: Sets or queries the logical combination of the input channels for the main logic trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_input
commands.description: Returns the main logic trigger input for all channels (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_input_ch
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger input for the specified channel (1, 2, or 3) (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_pattern_input_ch4
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger input for channel 4 when class is PATtern (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_pattern_when
commands.description: Sets or queries a condition for generating a main logic pattern trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_pattern_when_lesslimit
commands.description: Sets or queries the maximum time the selected pattern may be true and still generate a main logic pattern trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_pattern_when_morelimit
commands.description: Sets or queries the minimum time the selected pattern may be true and still generate a main logic pattern trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_clock_edge
commands.description: Sets or queries the clock edge polarity for setup and hold violation triggering (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_clock_level
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic setup/hold clock voltage trigger level (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_clock_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the clock source for the main logic trigger setup/hold input (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_data_level
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic set/hold data level (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_data_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the data channel for the main logic trigger set/hold input (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_holdtime
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger hold time (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

parameters.name: holdtime
parameters.range: positive values after clock edge, negative before

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_sethold_settime
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger setup time (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

parameters.name: settime
parameters.range: positive values before clock edge, negative after

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_state_input_ch4
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger input for channel 4 when class is STATE (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_state_when
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic state trigger condition (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_threshold
commands.description: Returns the main logic trigger threshold voltage for all channels (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_threshold_ch
commands.description: Sets or queries the main logic trigger threshold voltage for the specified channel (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_logic_when
commands.description: Specifies whether the main logic trigger occurs when the specified state goes true or false when class is PATtern (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_mode
commands.description: Sets or queries the main trigger mode.

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse
commands.description: Returns the main pulse trigger parameters (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_class
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of pulse to trigger on (not on TDS 400A).
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:PULse:CLAss { GLItch | RUNT | WIDth | SLEWRate | TIMEOut }

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_glitch
commands.description: Returns the current main glitch pulse trigger parameters (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_glitch_filter
commands.description: Controls glitch detection for the main pulse glitch trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_glitch_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the polarity for the main pulse glitch trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_glitch_width
commands.description: Sets or queries the width for the main pulse glitch trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt
commands.description: Returns the current parameters for the main pulse runt trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the polarity for the main pulse runt trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_threshold
commands.description: Returns the upper and lower thresholds for the main pulse runt trigger (not on TDS 400A).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_threshold_both
commands.description: Sets the trigger level switching thresholds for the main pulse runt trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

parameters.name: both
parameters.range: TTL (upper 1.8 V, lower 0.8 V) | ECL (upper -1.1 V, lower -1.5 V)

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_threshold_high
commands.description: Sets or queries the upper limit for the main pulse runt trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_threshold_low
commands.description: Sets or queries the lower limit for the main pulse runt trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_when
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of pulse width the trigger checks for when it uncovers a runt (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_runt_width
commands.description: Sets or queries the minimum width for a valid main pulse runt trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_deltatime
commands.description: Sets or queries the delta time used in calculating the slew rate trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the polarity for the main pulse slew rate trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_slewrate
commands.description: Returns the slew rate value, (Upper Threshold - Lower Threshold) / Delta Time (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_threshold_both
commands.description: Sets the upper and lower slew rate trigger thresholds (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

parameters.name: both
parameters.range: TTL (upper 1.8 V, lower 0.8 V) | ECL (upper -1.1 V, lower -1.5 V)

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_threshold_high
commands.description: Sets or queries the upper limit of the two threshold levels a pulse edge must traverse for the slew rate trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_threshold_low
commands.description: Sets or queries the lower limit of the two threshold levels a pulse edge must traverse for the slew rate trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_slewrate_when
commands.description: Sets or queries whether to check for a slewing signal faster or slower than the specified delta time (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for the main pulse trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_timeout_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the polarity for the main pulse timeout trigger (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_timeout_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the pulse timeout trigger time, in seconds (TDS 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_width
commands.description: Returns the width parameters for the main pulse width trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_width_highlimit
commands.description: Sets or queries the upper limit for the main pulse width trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_width_lowlimit
commands.description: Sets or queries the lower limit for the main pulse width trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_width_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the polarity for the main pulse width trigger (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_pulse_width_when
commands.description: Selects the condition when the main pulse width trigger occurs (TDS 510A, 500C, 600B & 700C only).

commands.name: trigger_main_type
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of main trigger.
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:TYPe { EDGE | LOGIc | PULse | COMMunication | VIDeo }

commands.name: trigger_main_video
commands.description: Returns the main video trigger parameters (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_by
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger delay mode (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_field
commands.description: Sets or queries the field the video trigger acts on (option 05 only).
commands.set: TRIGger:MAIn:VIDeo:FIELD { ODD | EVEN | ALL | FIELD1 | FIELD2 | FIELDEither | <NR1> }

parameters.name: field
parameters.range: ODD | EVEN | ALL | FIELD1 | FIELD2 | FIELDEither | <NR1>

commands.name: trigger_main_video_fieldtype
commands.description: Sets or queries the field the video trigger acts on by type (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat
commands.description: Returns the main flexible-format video trigger parameters (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_fieldrate
commands.description: Sets or queries the flexible-format video field rate (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_fields
commands.description: Sets or queries the flexible-format video number of fields (option 05 only).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.range: number of fields in the standard

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_lines
commands.description: Sets or queries the flexible-format video lines in a frame (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_negsyncwidth
commands.description: Sets or queries the flexible-format negative sync width (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_v1starttime
commands.description: Sets or queries the time from t0 to the leading edge of the first negative vertical sync pulse (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_v1stoptime
commands.description: Sets or queries the time from t0 to the trailing edge of the first negative vertical sync pulse (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_v2starttime
commands.description: Sets or queries the time from t0 to the leading edge of the second vertical sync pulse (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_flexformat_v2stoptime
commands.description: Sets or queries the time from t0 to the trailing edge of the second negative vertical sync pulse (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_hdtv
commands.description: Sets or queries the high definition TV frame rate format (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_holdoff
commands.description: Returns the video trigger holdoff value (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_holdoff_value
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger holdoff value as a percent of the holdoff range (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_interlace
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger interlace format when class is set to Custom (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_line
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger in terms of a number of lines (option 05 only).

parameters.name: line
parameters.range: a number of lines to delay by

commands.name: trigger_main_video_lines
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger delay in terms of a number of lines, for backward compatibility (option 05 only).

parameters.name: lines
parameters.range: a number of lines to delay by

commands.name: trigger_main_video_ntsc
commands.description: Sets or queries the NTSC video mode selection (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_pal
commands.description: Sets or queries the PAL video trigger mode selection (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_scan
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger scan rate (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_scanperiod
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger scan period (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the source for the main video trigger (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_standard
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger standard (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_sync
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger sync polarity (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_system
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger class (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_main_video_time
commands.description: Sets or queries the video trigger delay time (option 05 only).

commands.name: trigger_state
commands.description: Returns the current state of the triggering system.

commands.name: trg
commands.description: Executes commands that are defined by *DDT.

commands.name: tst
commands.description: Tests the GPIB interface and always returns a 0.

commands.name: unlock
commands.description: Unlocks the front panel, equivalent to LOCk NONe.

commands.name: verbose
commands.description: Sets and queries the Verbose State that controls the length of keywords on query responses.

commands.name: wai
commands.description: Prevents the oscilloscope from executing further commands or queries until all pending operations finish.

commands.name: wavfrm
commands.description: Returns WFMPre? and CURVe? data for the waveform(s) specified by DATa:SOUrce.

commands.name: wfmpre
commands.description: Returns the waveform formatting data for the first ordered waveform specified by DATa:SOUrce.

commands.name: wfmpre_bit_nr
commands.description: Returns the number of bits per binary waveform point for the first ordered waveform (ignored on input).

commands.name: wfmpre_bn_fmt
commands.description: Sets or queries the format of binary data for the first ordered waveform.

commands.name: wfmpre_byt_nr
commands.description: Sets or queries the binary field data width for the first ordered waveform (equivalent to DATa:WIDth).

commands.name: wfmpre_byt_or
commands.description: Selects which byte of binary waveform data is transmitted first when byte width is 2.

commands.name: wfmpre_encdg
commands.description: Sets or queries the type of encoding for waveform data transferred with the CURVe command.

commands.name: wfmpre_pt_fmt
commands.description: Selects the point format of the waveform data for the first ordered waveform.

commands.name: wfmpre_pt_off
commands.description: Specifies the trigger point within the waveform record for the reference waveform specified by DATa:DESTination.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.range: 0 to the record length, position relative to DATa:STARt

commands.name: wfmpre_xincr
commands.description: Specifies the horizontal sampling interval for the reference waveform specified by DATa:DESTination.

commands.name: wfmpre_ymult
commands.description: Specifies the vertical scale factor for the reference waveform specified by DATa:DESTination.

commands.name: wfmpre_yoff
commands.description: Specifies the vertical offset for the reference waveform specified by DATa:DESTination.

commands.name: wfmpre_yzero
commands.description: Specifies the offset voltage for the reference waveform specified by DATa:DESTination.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm
commands.description: Returns the waveform formatting data for the specified waveform as ordered by DATa:SOUrce.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_nr_pt
commands.description: Sets or queries the number of points in the transmitted waveform record (ignored on input).

parameters.name: points
parameters.range: number of data points (0 = unspecified length)

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_pt_fmt
commands.description: Selects the data point format for the waveform selected by DATa:SOUrce.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_pt_off
commands.description: Returns the trigger point within the waveform record or extended acquisition.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.range: position of the trigger point relative to DATa:STARt

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_wfid
commands.description: Returns information about the waveform such as coupling, volts/div, time/div, acquisition mode, and record length (ignored on input).

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_xincr
commands.description: Sets or queries the horizontal sampling interval.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_xunit
commands.description: Returns the horizontal (X-axis) units of the waveform data at the time of creation (ignored on input).

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_xzero
commands.description: Sets or queries the horizontal (X-axis) origin offset.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_ymult
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical scale factor, in YUNit per unscaled data point value.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_yoff
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical position of the waveform.

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_yunit
commands.description: Returns the vertical (Y-axis) units of the waveform data at the time of creation (ignored on input).

commands.name: wfmpre_wfm_yzero
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical (Y-axis) offset voltage.

commands.name: zoom
commands.description: Resets the zoom transforms to default values for all traces or live traces; the query returns current positioning and scaling.

commands.name: zoom_dual
commands.description: Turns Dual Zoom mode on and off.

commands.name: zoom_dual_offset
commands.description: Adjusts the requested horizontal offset between the centers of the main and second zoom boxes.

commands.name: zoom_graticule
commands.description: Selects between the upper and lower graticule for use by the zoom preview state.

commands.name: zoom_horizontal_lock
commands.description: Specifies the waveforms that the horizontal zoom parameters affect.

commands.name: zoom_horizontal_position
commands.description: Sets or queries the horizontal position of zoomed waveforms.

parameters.name: position
parameters.range: 0 to 100, percent of waveform to the left of graticule

commands.name: zoom_horizontal_scale
commands.description: Sets or queries the horizontal expansion factor.

commands.name: zoom_state
commands.description: Turns Zoom mode on and off.

commands.name: zoom_vertical_position
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical position of zoomed waveforms.

commands.name: zoom_vertical_scale
commands.description: Sets or queries the vertical expansion and compression factor.
